todos.content: Bug 1: Session isolation - reset_batch_slot on new connection to clear stale model state
Bug 1: ears-dictation client sends session_reset on connect to clear any server-side leftovers
Bug 2: start_dictation() must check server is running and auto-start if not
Bug 2: ears-dictation binary must also check server before connecting
Compile and verify with remote-build check
Create bd issues for the two bugs
